## PUB-03: PhD Dissertation

### 🎓 Defense Date

**2026-06-15** — Saint Petersburg State University (СПбГУ)

### 📋 Required Deliverables

### 1. All 36 Glava Chapters with Coq Proofs

| Glava | Topic | Current Status | Needs |
|-------|-------|----------------|-------|
| Glava 28 | φ²+φ⁻²=3, GF16, VSA | ✅ Implemented | Coq proofs |
| Glava 29 | Cassini POST | ✅ Implemented | ✅ Ready |
| Glava 30 | BitNet b1.58 | ✅ Implemented | Benchmarks |
| Glava 31 | K3 logic, t27 ISA | ✅ Implemented | Coq proofs |
| Glava 32 | FHRR hypervectors | ✅ Implemented | Experiments |
| Glava 33 | BPB lower bound | ✅ Implemented | Coq proofs |
| Glava 34 | BLAKE3, audit | ✅ Implemented | Security analysis |
| Glava 35 | Crown47, sacred constants | ✅ Implemented | ✅ Ready |
| Glava 36 | TG-TRIAD-X D2D | ✅ Implemented | Cross-chip test |

### 2. Silicon Return from TTSKY26b

**Expected**: January 2026
**Required**:
- [ ] Measured power data (not projected)
- [ ] Timing verification (50 MHz on SKY130A)
- [ ] Cross-chip anchor test (φ=e=γ=0x47C0)
- [ ] CLARA gap effectiveness (measured, not simulated)

### 3. Three Peer-Reviewed Papers

- [ ] PUB-01: Journal paper (IEEE TNNLS)
- [ ] PUB-02: Conference paper (NeurIPS 2026)
- [ ] Additional workshop paper (optional)

### 4. Open Source t27 Toolchain v2.0

See issue #14 [OS-01] t27 Toolchain v2.0

14 falsifiability witnesses from PhD dissertation.
